# AudioHardwareControl

**Class**

Instances of the AudioHardwareControl class encapsulate a single audio control, which provides properties that describe/manipulate a particular aspect of the owning object such as gain, mute, data source selection, etc.

## Declaration

```swift
class AudioHardwareControl
```

## Initializers

- **init(id:)**

## Instance Properties

- **availableItems**: An array of UInt32s that represent the IDs of all the items available.
- **booleanValue**: A Bool that represents the value of the boolean control.
- **selectedItems**: An array of UInt32s that are the IDs of the items currently selected.
- **sliderRange**: An array of two UInt32s that represents the inclusive range of values the slider control can take.
- **sliderValue**: A UInt32 that represents the value of the slider control.
- **stereoPanChannels**: An array of two UInt32s that indicate which elements of the device the signal is being panned between.
- **stereoPanValue**: A Float where 0.0 is full left, 1.0 is full right, and 0.5 is center.
- **volumeDecibelRange**: An AudioValueRange that contains the minimum and maximum dB values the control can have.
- **volumeDecibelValue**: A Float that represents the value of the volume control in dB.
- **volumeScalarValue**: A Float that represents the value of the volume control. The range is between 0.0 and 1.0 (inclusive).

## Instance Methods

- **convertToDecibels(fromScalar:)**: Convert a volume scalar value to the equivalent dB value.
- **convertToScalar(fromDecibels:)**: Convert a volume dB value to the equivalent scalar value.
- **selectorItemKind(fromID:)**: This property returns a UInt32 that identifies the kind of selector item the item ID refers to.
- **selectorItemName(fromID:)**: Translates the given item ID into a human readable name.
- **setBooleanValue(_:)**: Set the booleanValue property.
- **setSelectedItems(_:)**: Set the selectedItems property.
- **setSliderValue(_:)**: Set the sliderValue property.
- **setStereoPanValue(_:)**: Set the stereoPanValue property.
- **setVolumeDecibelValue(_:)**: Set the decibelScalarValue property.
- **setVolumeScalarValue(_:)**: Set the volumeScalarValue property.

## Inherits From

- AudioHardwareObject

## Conforms To

- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
